2605.23179.title: Redrawing the AI Map: A Theory of Accountability Boundaries in Agentic Ecosystems
2605.23179.paper_summary: Agentic AI orchestrators reduce the interface and assembly costs of composing information systems capabilities across organizational boundaries, seemingly accelerating modularization and organizational disaggregation. Yet AI-enabled capabilities whose outputs require evidence, review, signoff, or assignable responsibility may retain integrated accountability boundaries even when their technical interfaces become modular. We develop a capability-level theory of accountability-boundary placement in agentic ecosystems. We introduce accountability assets: complementary assets that make AI-supported outputs legitimate, auditable, reviewable, and assignable to a responsible party. We argue that verification cost and responsibility transferability determine whether the execution and accountability boundaries can move together. The theory identifies three boundary strategies: component, integrated, and dual-track. It also introduces rule debt, the governance burden that accrues when organizational decision rules migrate from formal information systems into ungoverned agentic execution environments. Integrating digital innovation, transaction cost, complementary-assets, digital platform governance, and IS control perspectives, we develop seven propositions linking agentic assembly-cost reductions, accountability assets, appropriability, orchestrator intent capture, and boundary misconfiguration to boundary strategy, value appropriation, and rule debt. The theory explains when digital modularization extends to organizational disaggregation and when accountability keeps capabilities integrated. Structured illustrations across document processing, legal services, audit, clinical decision support, and procurement discipline the boundary logic.
2605.23179.paper_summary_zh: 代理人工智慧協調者減少了跨組織邊界組成資訊系統能力的介面和組裝成本，似乎加速了模組化和組織解構。然而，當輸出需要證據、審查、簽署或可指派責任的AI驅動能力，即使其技術介面變得模組化，仍可能保留整合的問責邊界。我們在代理生態系統中發展了一個能力層級的問責邊界定位理論。我們引入了問責資產：使AI支持的輸出合法、可審計、可審查並可指派給負責方的互補資產。我們主張，驗證成本和責任可轉移性決定了執行和問責邊界是否能夠一起移動。該理論識別了三種邊界策略：組件、整合和雙軌。它還引入了規則債務，這是當組織決策規則從正式資訊系統遷移到無治理的代理執行環境時所產生的治理負擔。通過整合數位創新、交易成本、互補資產、數位平台治理和資訊系統控制的觀點，我們發展了七個命題，將代理組裝成本降低、問責資產、可適用性、協調者意圖捕捉和邊界錯誤配置與邊界策略、價值適用和規則債務聯繫起來。該理論解釋了數位模組化何時擴展到組織解構，以及何時問責使能力保持整合。在文件處理、法律服務、審計、臨床決策支持和採購等領域的結構化插圖中，闡明了邊界邏輯。
2605.23179.author: Muhammad Zia Hydari et.al.
